performance_overview: Through 25 sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-30) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY unavailable (persistent TLS error). All 7 trades closed same-day; zero overnight holds met criteria. Last 24 sessions have all been flat with zero entries — chronic ATR% compression across the current defensives/utilities universe is the root cause. Book is flat at $99,938.80.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean but sample is small — keep enforcing until n>=10)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap; skip entirely
Gap-up opens with RSI >60: zero qualifications across all 25 sessions; any name opening RSI >60 is a hard skip regardless of structural setup quality or conviction

Opening-bar RSI surge pattern: even premarket-clean RSI names (PANW 57, AMGN 58 premarket on June 29; D 58.2 premarket on June 30) surged well past the RSI 60 ceiling on the opening bar — the gap-up trap is systematic and persistent; do NOT chase within first 5-10 minutes of open even if RSI looked clean premarket

Current defensives/utilities universe (CFG, DTE, WEC, CNC, D, FRT, ED, NSC, KIM, AMGN, TFC): chronic ATR% compression 0.042-0.189% far below 0.30% floor; full universe refresh is highest-priority action before July 7 entry session
overnight_hold_insights: Zero overnight carries across all 25 sessions. The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. Policy is sound and conservative — no change warranted. DOWN SPY regime increases overnight gap-down risk further.
recent_market_context: June 30 ended flat — the 24th consecutive no-entry session and last trading day before the July 4 holiday break. SPY DOWN regime (EMA-9 737.95 < EMA-21 740.11). Equity $99,938.80 unchanged. SPY return unavailable (persistent TLS error).
notes_for_next_session:
FOR EVENING SCAN AGENT (Sunday July 6 or Monday July 7 premarket) AND EOD AGENT (Monday July 7).

BOOK STATE: Flat. 0 open positions. Equity $99,938.80. daytrade_count=0 (reset for new week), no PDT restriction.

HOLIDAY CONTEXT: July 3 was early-close/observed holiday, July 4 was Independence Day. Next full trading session: Monday July 7. Markets likely to see post-holiday volume dynamics — verify ATR% is actually alive before entering.

UNIVERSE REFRESH — CRITICAL, HIGHEST PRIORITY: The current 11-name defensives/utilities universe (CFG, DTE, WEC, CNC, D, FRT, ED, NSC, KIM, AMGN, TFC) has failed the ATR% gate on every single session for 24+ consecutive days. The filters are correct; the candidate pool is the problem. Evening scan MUST build a fresh universe targeting:
  - Higher-beta sectors: technology, financials, healthcare, industrials, consumer discretionary
  - ATR% routinely above 0.35% (not just barely clearing 0.30%)
  - RS_MIN=1.10 (tighten back from the widened 1.05 threshold used June 29)
  - HIGH_PROXIMITY_PCT=0.08 (tighten back from widened 0.10)
  - Avoid: utilities (EIX, ES, D, DTE, WEC, ED — all failed ATR floor repeatedly), REITs (KIM, FRT — ATR compressed), defensive managed-care (CNC)

SPY REGIME: Was DOWN (EMA-9 < EMA-21) as of June 30. Recheck July 7 — three trading days have passed, regime may have shifted. If DOWN, cap at 3 positions. If UP, normal sizing.

RSI CEILING: Hard at RSI=60. No exceptions. Gap-up trap is systemic — confirmed again June 30 (D surged 16+ RSI points at open from premarket reading of 58.2).

GAP-UP TRAP PROTOCOL: Wait minimum 5-10 minutes after open before evaluating any name. RSI can surge 10-20 points from premarket reading on the opening bar.

ATR CHECK: Always verify ATR% >= 0.30% before any entry. Post-holiday volume may be low — ATR% may be further compressed on July 7; verify live before ordering.

SIGNAL BUCKET REMINDER: Only RSI 55-60 at entry has a positive track record (2/2, 100%, avg +2.15%). RSI 60-65 is 0/3 (-1.06%). Stay disciplined.
